graph_gate_basis: finite-N graph extracted mass residual in ppm, not index proximity
depinning_prior_sigma_note: No hard-coded 4.4 sigma headline is emitted. The LEA block reports p_global=1.0 when pairs_matching=0; nonzero matches use pairs_matching * p_per_pair under the current search space.

muon_first_order.description: First-order precision using only (1 + 5*alpha) — Tier 2 GCT drag postulate

muon_second_order.description: Tier 2 mechanism + A3 + Tier 3 closed-form precision; bare phi^N residuals are large
muon_second_order.tier: Tier 2 mechanism + A3 measured alpha + Tier 3 closed-form precision
muon_second_order.note: The phi^8*alpha^2 term is a Tier 3 closed-form handle pending O.5/O.15/O.19; bare phi^N residuals are large.

alpha_anchor: A3 measured low-energy alpha is used in corrected lepton precision comparisons; bare GCT alpha is audited separately under O.19/O.5.

look_elsewhere.galois_search_space: integer exponents N in [8,25]; not Lucas-restricted
look_elsewhere.canonical_sigma_note: Published firewall headline for the full non-Lucas sweep is not inferred from this zero-match diagnostic; recompute from the registered statistic if the search space or threshold changes.

fourth_generation_audit.explanation: Harmonic mode exceeds the 18D phase-space tangent bundle capacity. Sequence mathematically bound to N=11, 17.
